name: Madam Chair of the Neighborhood Association
text:
Other creatures you control get +1/+1.
Whenever the table votes, you may call the meeting to order: tap any number of untapped Voters you control. For each one tapped this way, you draw a card or create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token (chosen as each taps).
{4}{G}{W}: Tabling motion — until your next turn, the player who controls the most permanents can't cast spells unless they pay {2} more, citing Robert's Rules of Order.
flavorText: She has the gavel. She has the agenda. She has, somewhere, the minutes from 1997 and she WILL reference them.
